title: craspedia uniflora var. subhispida
intro: Craspedia uniflora var. subhispida, also known as Billy Button, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It belongs to the family Asteraceae and is known for its yellow spherical flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be beneficial for wound healing and reducing swelling. The herbal preparations of Billy Button can be consumed as tea or used in topical applications to take advantage of its health benefits, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
